comment: Config for the AI PR Review transcript upload (scripts/review.sh). The reviewer pipes the full per-lane findings + verdict trace to this PrivateBin paste (markdown formatter) and links the resulting paste from the posted review. Pastes are client-side encrypted; the decryption key lives only in the URL fragment, so the content is link-gated. Only already-public review output (model findings about a public PR diff) is uploaded — never secrets or the diff itself. The empty bin name marks the default instance.
